PTG.SystemDescription: A Foundry VTT system for Part-Time Gods Second Edition.

AutoPopulate.Name: Auto-populate premade Part-Time Gods compendiums
AutoPopulate.Hint: Creates the system's premade character creation choices, play items, maps, and rules journals in system compendiums for GMs.

ShowGMSetupOnReady.Name: Show the Part-Time Gods GM setup panel on first GM login
ShowGMSetupOnReady.Hint: Opens the setup panel once in a fresh world so GMs can find compendium population, territory, combat, opposition, and rules tools without slash commands.

BalanceChatMode.Name: Mortal-Divine Balance chat output
BalanceChatMode.Hint: Controls whether Mortal-Divine Balance adjustments post chat cards.

Notifications.EmbeddedItemsMigrated: Part-Time Gods migrated {createdItems} legacy sheet note(s) into owned Items.
Notifications.EmbeddedItemsMigrationFailed: Part-Time Gods embedded Item migration failed. Check the console for details.
Notifications.OnlyGMFollowerScene: Only a GM can create Worshipper and Vassal actors on a scene.
Notifications.NoActiveScene: No active scene is available for token creation.

Setup.Title: PTG Setup
Setup.Subtitle: World setup and table tools
Setup.FirstRunHint: Use these tools to populate packs, create the territory scene, open rules, and launch the table workflows most GMs need first.
Setup.FirstRunNotification: Part-Time Gods GM setup is open. You can reopen it from the PTG scene controls or game.ptg.setup.open().

Setup.Label: Setup
Setup.Hint: Run these once in a new world or after rebuilding source-backed compendiums.

Play.Label: Table Tools
Play.Hint: Open the main PTG2E workflows without remembering slash commands.

PopulateCompendia.Label: Populate Compendia
PopulateCompendia.Hint: Create or refresh the system's source-backed Items, Actors, Journals, Tables, Scenes, and Macros.

TerritoryScene.Label: Create/Open Territory Scene
TerritoryScene.Hint: Create or open the God Territory Grid scene and prepare its stored grid data.

TerritoryGrid.Label: Open Territory Grid
TerritoryGrid.Hint: Open the Territory Grid app for tracking landmarks, worshippers, rivals, threats, and influence.

CombatControls.Label: Combat Controls
CombatControls.Hint: Open PTG2E combat helpers for initiative, damage, and condition handling.

PantheonPool.Label: Pantheon Pool
PantheonPool.Hint: Open the shared Pantheon Dice workflow for divine costs, Curses, and table-facing spends.

MortalDivineTracker.Label: Mortal/Divine Tracker
MortalDivineTracker.Hint: Track a character's pressure between mortal obligations and divine identity.

OppositionBuilder.Label: Opposition Builder
OppositionBuilder.Hint: Open the antagonist builder for source-backed Outsiders, mortals, spirits, and quick opposition.

RulesReference.Label: Rules Reference
RulesReference.Hint: Open the summarized rules-reference compendium with source-page markers.

Notifications.RulesReferenceMissing: Part-Time Gods Rules Reference compendium is not available.
Notifications.RulesReferenceEmpty: Part-Time Gods Rules Reference compendium has no readable Journal entries.
Notifications.GMOnly: Only a GM can use that Part-Time Gods setup action.
Notifications.MissingHelper: Part-Time Gods setup helper is missing for {label}.
Notifications.ActionFailed: {label} failed. See the console for details.

Help.CharacterCreator: Open the character creator to apply source-backed Occupation, Archetype, Dominion, and Theology choices.
Help.MortalDivineBalance: Track whether the character is leaning toward mortal obligations or divine identity.
Help.Health: Health measures physical harm. Its maximum is 5 plus Fortitude plus Spark.
Help.Psyche: Psyche measures mental or spiritual harm. Its maximum is 5 plus Discipline plus Spark.
Help.FreeTime: Free Time is the character's available downtime for work, obligations, recovery, investigation, and mortal life.
Help.Wealth: Wealth is spendable money and material leverage for gear, favors, lifestyle pressure, and downtime choices.
Help.PantheonPool: The Pantheon Pool stores shared Pantheon Dice that can be spent by members and refilled through Curses or table events.
Help.Fragments: Fragments fuel divine effort and Manifestation boosts. Fragment maximum is Spark times 3.
Help.Spark: Spark is the god's divine tier. It affects Health, Psyche, Fragments, advancement, and mythic scope.
Help.Strain: Strain marks pressure on Bonds, Worshippers, and Vassals. High Strain means the relationship needs attention.
Help.Conditions: Conditions capture harm, complications, ongoing penalties, and recoverable states.
Help.ManifestationMeasures: Manifestation Measures spend successes after a Manifestation roll on damage, range, targets, duration, scale, or narrative detail.

Balance.Title: Mortal-Divine Balance
Balance.NoEvents: No Mortal-Divine Balance events logged yet.
Balance.EmptyDrop: Drop a character actor here to begin tracking.
Balance.OnlyGMOpen: Only a GM can open the Mortal-Divine Balance tracker.
Balance.OnlyGMEdit: Only a GM can edit the Mortal-Divine Balance tracker.
Balance.TrackCharacter: Track a character actor for Mortal-Divine Balance.
Balance.DropCharacter: Drop a character actor onto the Mortal-Divine Balance tracker.
Balance.DropFirst: Drop a character actor onto the tracker first.
Balance.ClearLogContent: Clear the Mortal-Divine Balance log for {actorName}?

Buttons.HumanObligations: Spent Free Time on Human Obligations
Buttons.DivineAsset: Gained Truth, Relic, Vassal, or Worshippers
Buttons.SparkDominion: Advanced Spark or Leaned Into Dominion

Damage.NoEditableActors: No editable actors are available for applying damage.
Damage.Title: Apply PTG2E Damage
Damage.ApplyArmor: Apply equipped armor to Health damage
Damage.ChooseActor: Choose an actor before applying damage.
Damage.NoPermission: You do not have permission to update {actorName}.

Chat.ConditionUnresolved: This Condition could not be resolved from the chat card.
